description: Binding-string providers that return parseable binding text.

behaviors.statement: A subclass can define bindings by returning a binding string from `getBindingString()`, and `getBindingAccessors` parses that string into named accessors.
Binding preprocessing can rewrite a missing value through a handler `preprocess` hook, so `b` can become `b:false`.
Binding preprocessing leaves explicit values intact, so `b: true` remains `true` instead of being replaced by the fallback.
